name: Woven Dot Line Shower Curtain Ivory/Black - Threshold™
description:
Refresh your bath space with this Woven Dotted Line Shower Curtain from Threshold™. Made from 100% cotton, the decorative shower curtain features a buttonhole top for easy installation and is machine washable for a quick refresh whenever needed. It's adorned with a black horizontal dotted line pattern on a white background to elegantly enclose your bathtub or shower stall for added privacy and style.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
